name: Gatekeeper — Token Safety Check
description: Pre-trade token safety gate for AI agents. One call returns a composite GO/CAUTION/BLOCK verdict with a 0–100 safety score and reasons: honeypot, buy/sell tax, mint authority, owner powers, LP lock, holder concentration, liquidity — across Base, Solana, Arbitrum, BNB (43 chains via GoPlus). Conservative: missing data never returns GO. Free known-scam lookup; per-buyer risk policy via ACP Accounts; daily approval monitoring via Notification Memos. Informational, not financial advice.

skills.name: Token Gate (safety verdict)
skills.description: GO/CAUTION/BLOCK verdict + 0–100 score + reasons for any token, multichain. Conservative: missing data never GO.

skills.name: Deep Forensics
skills.description: token_gate + live honeypot.is simulation + deployer-wallet screening + contract verification.

skills.name: Wallet Screen
skills.description: Screen a wallet for phishing/scam/theft/sanctions/mixer history.

skills.name: Approval Monitor
skills.description: Daily re-check of held/approved tokens; Notification Memo on risk transition.

skills.name: Risk Policy
skills.description: Set per-buyer risk thresholds (ACP Accounts); verdicts adapt to your policy.

resources.description: Free: is this address a known scam/phishing/malicious address?

disclaimer: Informational security signals aggregated from public sources (GoPlus, honeypot.is, DexScreener, on-chain). Not financial advice.
